## RPC contract

| RPC | gRPC | REST |
|-----|------|------|
| AccessBindingService/Create | (CreateAccessBindingRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /iam/v1/accessBindings |
| AccessBindingService/Delete | (DeleteAccessBindingRequest) → operation.Operation | DELETE /iam/v1/accessBindings/{access_binding_id} |
| AccessBindingService/Get | (GetAccessBindingRequest) → AccessBinding | GET /iam/v1/accessBindings/{access_binding_id} |
| AccessBindingService/ListByResource | (ListAccessBindingsByResourceRequest) → ListAccessBindingsResponse | GET /iam/v1/accessBindings:listByResource |
| AccessBindingService/ListBySubject | (ListAccessBindingsBySubjectRequest) → ListAccessBindingsResponse | GET /iam/v1/accessBindings:listBySubject |
